name: Lasagna of Greens and Lemon
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch Swiss chard, rinsed, trimmed and chopped
1 bunch Mustard greens, rinsed, trimmed and chopped
1 bunch Kale, rinsed, trimmed and chopped
1/2 lb Brown mushrooms, rinsed, trimmed and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saute pan or wok, stir-fry Swiss chard, mustard greens and kale just with water clinging to leaves after rinsing.
2. Cook the greens for 3-5 minutes, adding garlic and cooking until all greens are tender (about 10 minutes), stirring frequently.
3. Add half of lemon juice and stir until all moisture is reabsorbed. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Heat a non-stick saute pan over high heat. When very hot, add mushrooms and cook, tossing and stirring constantly until browned.
5. Add the mushrooms to the greens mixture and allow it to cool completely; the mixture should be dry.
6. In a large mixing bowl, combine ricotta, goat cheese and lemon zest. Add the remaining half of lemon juice and stir to combine.
7. When the greens are completely cool, add them to the cheese mixture and stir well. Season to taste with salt.
8. Assemble the lasagna: spread 3/4 cup tomato puree on the bottom and sides of a glass baking pan. Cook the pasta in boiling water, then drain.
9. Lay one sheet of pasta at the bottom of the pan, covering it completely. Spread half of the cheese mixture over the pasta sheet.
10. Sprinkle one-third of mozzarella over the top.
11. Repeat layering with another sheet of pasta, spreading remaining tomato puree and sprinkling the rest of the mozzarella on top.
12. Bake at 300°F for 30-45 minutes until heated through.
Each serving contains about: 364 calories; 294 milligrams sodium; 110 milligrams cholesterol; 15 grams fat; 41 grams carbohydrates; 21 grams protein; 2.18 grams fiber.
